    Method UseBufferView

    UseBufferView(ArraySegment<byte>, int, BufferMode?)

    Creates or reuses a BufferView instance at .

    Declaration
    public BufferView UseBufferView(ArraySegment<byte> data, int byteStride = 0, BufferMode? target = null)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    ArraySegment<byte> data

    The array range to wrap.
    int byteStride

    For strided vertex buffers, it must be a value multiple of 4, 0 otherwise
    BufferMode? target

    The type hardware device buffer, or null
    Returns
    Type Description
    BufferView

    A BufferView instance.

    UseBufferView(byte[], int, int?, int, BufferMode?)

    Creates or reuses a BufferView instance at .

    Declaration
    public BufferView UseBufferView(byte[] buffer, int byteOffset = 0, int? byteLength = null, int byteStride = 0, BufferMode? target = null)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    byte[] buffer

    The array to wrap.
    int byteOffset

    The zero-based index of the first Byte in buffer
    int? byteLength

    The number of elements in buffer
    int byteStride

    For strided vertex buffers, it must be a value multiple of 4, 0 otherwise
    BufferMode? target

    The type hardware device buffer, or null
    Returns
    Type Description
    BufferView

    A BufferView instance.

    UseBufferView(Buffer, int, int?, int, BufferMode?)

    Creates or reuses a BufferView instance at .

    Declaration
    public BufferView UseBufferView(Buffer buffer, int byteOffset = 0, int? byteLength = null, int byteStride = 0, BufferMode? target = null)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    Buffer buffer

    The buffer to wrap.
    int byteOffset

    The zero-based index of the first Byte in buffer
    int? byteLength

    The number of elements in buffer
    int byteStride

    For strided vertex buffers, it must be a value multiple of 4, 0 otherwise
    BufferMode? target

    The type hardware device buffer, or null
    Returns
    Type Description
    BufferView

    A BufferView instance.
